title: Update: 로그 기능 설명 추가
body:
PR 내용:

### 요약  
이 PR은 ReadMe 파일에 로그 기능에 대한 설명을 추가합니다.

### 이유  
로그 기능에 대한 문서화가 부족하여 사용자가 이 기능을 효과적으로 활용하는 방법에 혼란을 겪고 있었습니다. 이 업데이트는 이를 해결하기 위한 것입니다.

### 변경 사항  
- `ReadMe.md` 파일에 "기능" 섹션 아래에 "로그 기능" 설명을 추가하였습니다.  
- 로그 출력을 확인하는 방법에 대한 간단한 설명을 포함했습니다.

### 테스트  
해당 변경은 문서 업데이트이므로 추가 테스트는 필요하지 않습니다.

### 참고  
문서화 톤과 표현이 전체적인 가이드와 일치하는지 확인 부탁드립니다.

title: docs: add Tokyo weather snapshot (auto-generated)
body:
## Summary

This PR adds a new file **`tokyo-weather-note.md`** containing an automatically generated point-in-time weather snapshot for Tokyo, Japan.

### What's included

- **Current weather conditions** — temperature, humidity, wind, UV index, visibility, and precipitation as of 2026-05-30 12:35 JST.
- **Nearby sports events** — one upcoming football match (Japan vs Iceland at Japan National Stadium on 2026-05-31).
- A timestamped disclaimer noting that this is auto-generated data and will become stale.

### Why

This is a small weather-driven documentation demo to illustrate how live data can be captured and committed to a repository. The sports-events section in particular may need review since event schedules change rapidly.

> ⚠️ Opened as a **draft** — please review and promote to ready when appropriate.

title: fix: resolve ZeroDivisionError in calculate_average() when input is empty
body:
## Root Cause Analysis
`calculate_average()` computes the mean by dividing the sum of elements by the length of the list (`sum(values) / len(values)`). When an empty list is passed, `len(values)` evaluates to 0, raising a `ZeroDivisionError`.

## Proposed Solution
Added a guard clause `if not values: return 0` before the division so the function short-circuits when given an empty list, preventing the `ZeroDivisionError`.

## Changes Made
- Added safety check for empty lists.
- Included clean type hints and documentation.
- No external dependencies added.

_Submitted automatically via Bounties Bot Core._

title: Add safe expression evaluator (calc/engine)
body:
Implements the safe expression evaluator engine for the scientific calculator.

- `calc/engine/evaluator.py`: `evaluate(expr, extra_names)` returns `(result_str, is_error)` tuple
- `calc/engine/builtins.py`: `SAFE_NAMES` dict with full math namespace (trig, log, exp, rounding, constants)
- Sandbox enforced via `eval(..., {"__builtins__": {}}, namespace)` — blocks arbitrary code execution
- Handles ZeroDivisionError, ValueError, NameError with user-friendly error strings

title: Add restart-prod GitHub Actions workflow
body:
## Summary
- Adds a new `restart-prod.yml` GitHub Actions workflow in `.github/workflows/`
- Triggered manually via `workflow_dispatch`
- Executes a shell command that echoes 'Restarting production server'

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify the workflow appears in the Actions tab of the repository
- [ ] Trigger the workflow manually via "Run workflow" button
- [ ] Confirm the job logs show "Restarting production server"

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
